mapper.select: SELECT OGCM.BUSINESS_TYPE , OGCM.BUYER_CD , OGCM.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD_ORI , OGCM.BUYER_NM , OGCM.BUYER_NM_ENG , OGCM.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM , OGCM.CEO_USER_NM_ENG AS CEO_USER_NM_ENG , OGCM.CITY_NM , OGCM.COMPANY_REG_NUM , OGCM.COUNTRY_CD , OGCM.CUR , OGCM.DUNS_NUM , OGCM.FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM , OGCM.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM , OGCM.GATE_CD , OGCM.GATE_CD AS GATE_CD_ORI , OGCM.GMT_CD , OGCM.INDUSTRY_TYPE , OGCM.IRS_NUM , OGCM.LANG_CD , OGCM.REG_USER_ID , OGCM.ZIP_CD AS ZIP_CD , OGCM.ACCOUNT_UNIT_CD , OGCM.ZIP_CD_5 AS ZIP_CD_5 , CASE WHEN OGCM.USE_FLAG = '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_FLAG , (OGCM.FOUNDATION_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS FOUNDATION_DATE , GETGATENAME(OGCM.GATE_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS GATE_NM , (OGCM.REG_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') AS REG_DATE , (OGCM.REG_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS REG_DATE_FORM , GETUSERNAME(OGCM.GATE_CD, OGCM.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , OGCM.IRS_SUB_ZIP_CD AS IRS_SUB_ZIP_CD , OGCM.SUB_ZIP_CD_5 AS SUB_ZIP_CD_5 , OGCM.IRS_SUB_NO AS IRS_SUB_NO , OGCM.IRS_SUB_ADDR AS IRS_SUB_ADDR , OGCM.ADDR AS ADDR , OGCM.ADDR_ENG AS ADDR_ENG , OGCM.IRS_SUB_NM AS IRS_SUB_NM , OGCM.GW_USE_FLAG AS GW_USE_FLAG FROM STOCOGCM OGCM INNER JOIN STOCOGHU OGHU ON (OGCM.GATE_CD = OGHU.GATE_CD) WHERE OGCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND OGCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND OGHU.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY OGCM.BUYER_CD
SELECT COUNT(BUYER_CD) FROM STOCOGCM WHERE UPPER(GATE_CD) = UPPER(#{gateCd}) AND UPPER(BUYER_CD) = UPPER(#{buyerCd})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCOGCM ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , BUYER_NM , BUYER_NM_ENG , LANG_CD , COUNTRY_CD , CITY_NM , ADDR , ADDR_ENG , ZIP_CD , TEL_NUM , IRS_NUM , FAX_NUM , CEO_USER_NM , CEO_USER_NM_ENG , CUR , INDUSTRY_TYPE , BUSINESS_TYPE , COMPANY_REG_NUM , DUNS_NUM , GMT_CD , DEL_FLAG , REG_USER_ID , MOD_USER_ID , ACCOUNT_UNIT_CD , ZIP_CD_5 , USE_FLAG , GW_USE_FLAG , FOUNDATION_DATE , REG_DATE , MOD_DATE , IRS_SUB_ZIP_CD , IRS_SUB_NO , IRS_SUB_ADDR , IRS_SUB_NM , SUB_ZIP_CD_5 ) VALUES ( #{gateCd} , #{buyerCd} , #{buyerNm} , #{buyerNmEng} , #{langCd} , #{countryCd} , #{cityNm} , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{address}) , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{addressEng}) , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{zipCd}) , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{telNum}) , #{irsNum} , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{faxNum}) , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{ceoUserNm}) , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{ceoUserNmEng}) , #{cur} , #{industryType} , #{businessType} , #{companyRegNum} , #{dunsNum} , #{gmtCd} , '0' , #{ses.userId} , #{ses.userId} , #{ACCOUNT_UNIT_CD} , #{ZIP_CD_5} , CASE WHEN (#{USE_FLAG}, '') = '' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END , CASE WHEN (#{GW_USE_FLAG}, '') = '' THEN '0' ELSE '1' END , (#{foundationDate}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') , SYSDATE , SYSDATE , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{IRS_SUB_ZIP_CD}) , #{IRS_SUB_NO} , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{IRS_SUB_ADDR}) , #{IRS_SUB_NM} , GETENCPERSONALINFO(#{SUB_ZIP_CD_5}) )
